name: Akuma no Oni (coop)
text:
Corrupted. No non-[shadow] attachments.
Reaction: After you collect fate in the dynasty phase, each opponent chooses a non-[shadow] character with three or lower [mil] skill – bow each chosen character.

Corrupted. No non-[clan-shadowlands] attachments. Action: Choose a character. Its controller selects one - either remove all fate from that character or you may declare an additional [conflict-military] conflict this phase.
name: Akuma no Oni
The Obsidian Flower (coop)
text:
Corrupted. No non-[shadow] attachments.
Reaction: After you collect fate in the dynasty phase – each opponent taints a character they control.

Corrupted. No non-[clan-shadowlands] attachments. Action: Choose a tainted character an opponent controls. Its controller selects one - either each opponent loses 2 honor, or you gain control of the chosen character and it gains a [clan-shadowlands] clan symbol.
name: The Obsidian Flower
Atsuko the Calamitous (coop)
text:
Corrupted. No non-[shadow] attachments.
Reaction: After you collect fate in the dynasty phase – remove 2 random cards in each opponent's dynasty discard pile from the game. Bow each character in play with the same name as a card removed from the game this way.

Corrupted. No non-[clan-shadowlands] attachments. Reaction: Choose an opponent to select one - either that player sacrifices a character, or you play a character from your dynasty discard pile as if it were in your hand, reducing its cost by 2.
name: Atsuko the Calamitous

text: Reaction: After a conflict is declared against this province - remove 1 fate from each attacking character.
name: Blood Fields

text: Reaction: After a conflict is declared against this province - place 2 (per opponent) random characters in your dynasty discard pile on the bottom of your dynasty deck.
name: Defiled Cavern

text: Reaction: After a conflict is declared against this province - each opponent discards their hand and draws that many cards.
name: Fallen Chrysanthemum Lake

text: Reaction: After a conflict is declared against this province, choose an unclaimed ring - resolve the contested ring's effect and claim it. The chosen ring is now the constested ring.
name: False Lantern Grove

text: Reaction: After a conflict is declared against this province, choose a character in your dynasty discard pile - put that character into play in the conflict as a defender. Place 1 (per opponent) fate on it
name: Forgotten Tomb of Fu Leng

text: Reaction: After a conflict is declared against this province - dishonor each attacking tainted character, then taint each attacking character.
name: Garden of Corruption

text: Reaction: After a conflict is declared against this province, choose up to 1 (per opponent) characters in your provinces - put those characters into play in the conflict as defenders.
name: Haunted Jungles

text: Reaction: After a conflict is declared against this province, choose up to 1 attacking character by controlled by each opponent - bow each chosen character.
name: Maddening Emptiness

text: Reaction: After a conflict is declared against this province, choose up to 1 ready character in each opponent's home - move each of those characters to the conflict.
name: Sea of Shadows

text: Reaction: After a conflict is declared against this province - take 1 fate from each opponent.
name: Spectral Watchtower

flavorText: Akuma no Oni's army outfitted itself with the weapons and armor scavanged from fallen samurai.
name: Goblin Brawler

text: Reaction: After this character wins a conflict, choose a character an oppontn controls with equal or lower [conflict-military] skill than this character - bow the chosen character.
flavorText: "I'd be more worried about those teeth than that blade." - Hiruma Kogoe
name: Fouleye's Elite

text: Interrupt: When the conflict phase ends, choose up to 3 different [clan-shadowlands] Goblin characters - move 1 fate from your fate pool to each chosen character.
name: Goblin Hovel

text: Reaction: After a Goblin you control wins a conflict, remove 1 fate from it - resolve the contested ring's effect. (Limit twice per round.)
name: Detritus Priest

text: Reduce the cost to play each [clan-shadowlands] Goblin by 1. Each other [clan-shadowlands] Goblin gets +2[conflict-political]
flavorText: "Great gift. Lord accepts. You eat well tonight."
name: Chieftain Fouleye

text: Corrupted. (This character enters play tainted.)
name: Skeletal Warrior

text: Corrupted. No attachments except Weapon. Reaction: After this character wins a conflict, choose a character in your dynasty discard pile - put that character on top of your dynasty deck.
flavorText: Each death beyond the Wall is in service to Fu Leng.
name: Endless Ranks

text: Interrupt: When the conflict phase ends - discard each card from each opponent's provinces.
flavorText: "No kami will ever return to this place now." - Isawa Nobu
name: Killing Field

text: Corrupted. (This character enters play tainted.) Reaction: After this character wins a conflict - attach a random character in each opponent's discard pile to this character as an attachment, treating its printed text box as if it were blank. That card gains the text: "Add this card's printed [conflict-military] and [conflict-political] skill values to those of attached character."
name: Undead Horror

text: Reaction: After fate is removed from this character, choose a character in an opponent's dynasty discard pile - put that character into play under your control, tainted. It gains the [clan-shadowlands] clan symbol. While this character is in play, that character cannot leave play. Discard that character when this character leaves play.
name: Kitsu Sokori

text: Corrupted. (This character enters play tainted.) Reaction: After this character wins a conflict, choose a participating non-[clan-shadowlands] character - dishonor that character.
flavorText: The devotion of samurai, twisted by Jigoku into a mocker of Bushido.
name: Lost Samurai

text: Corrupted. (This character enters play tainted.) Reaction: After this character wins a conflict - discard each card in each opponent's provinces.
flavorText: "The thunder of hooves now brings me only terror and despair." - Shinjo Hideo
name: Onikage Rider

text: Corrupted. (This character enters play tainted.) Reaction: After this character wins a conflict - move 1 fate from your fate pool to it. It does not bow as a result of this conflict's resolution.
flavorText: "Such foul steeds will not succumb until their demon-riders have fallen." - Hida Tsuru
name: Dark Moto

text: Corrupted. No non-[clan-shadowlands] attachments. Reaction: After this character is declared as an attacker - honor each attacking character.
flavorText: One act of reckless pride. Three hundred years of terror.
name: Moto Tsume

text: Interrupt: When the conflict phase ends - gain 2 fate for each opponent. This ability triggers before each other [clan-shadowlands] holding's interrupt.
flavorText: "It is a court of demonic puppetry." - Kuni Yori
name: Thundering Tide Keep

text: Reaction: After this character wins a conflict - remove the top 3 cards of each opponent's conflict deck from the game. Then, remove from the game each attachment you do not control if it shares a name with a card removed by this effect.
name: Scavenging Goblin

text: Corrupted. (This character enters play tainted.) Reaction: After this character wins a conflict, choose a tainted participating character an opponent controls - move 1 fate from that character to this character.
flavorText: "Who is she now?" - Kitsuki Chiari
name: Penanggalan

flavorText: "Get away, runts! I've already lost enough of my dinner to your grimy kind."
name: Wild Ogre

text:
Corrupted. No non-[clan-shadowlands] attachments.
While this character is attacking, at least one character controlled by each opponent must be declared as a defender, if able.
flavorText: "Who can stand against it if not us?" - Hida Nanako
name: The Butcher of Ishigaki

text: Interrupt: When the conflict phase ends, spend up to 4 fate - put that many random cards in your dynasty discard pile on the bottom of your dynasty deck in a random order.
name: Oni Lair

text: Corrupted. (This character enters play tainted.) Reaction: After this character wins a conflict, choose a participating character - taint the chosen character.
flavorText: Nothing is wasted in the courts of the wicked.
name: Shambling Servant

text: Corrupted. (This character enters play tainted.) Reaction: After this character wins a conflict - each opponent discards 1 card from their hand.
flavorText: "Leave the wretched thing to its hopeless gnawing." - Kuni Ritsuko
name: Insatiable Gaki

text: Interrupt: When the conflict phase ends - each opponent loses 1 honor.
flavorText: The wind whisles with screams of the forgotten.
name: Haunted Ruins

text: Reaction: After fate is removed from this character, each opponent selects one - they must either lose 3 honor, discard 2 random cards from their hand or sacrifice a character.
flavorText: "I have need of you again, my wicked companion."
name: Chuda Gyushi

text: Corrupted. (This character enters play tainted.) Reaction: After this character wins a conflict, choose an opponent's tainted character - discard that character.
flavorText: "Only the deepest pits of Jigoku could spawn such evil." - Isawa Masahiro
name: Oni of Obsidian and Blood

text: Interrupt: When the conflict phase ends, spend up to 2 fate - for each fate spent this way, each opponent discards 1 random card from their hand.
name: Shrine to Jigoku

text: Corrupted. (This character enters play tainted.) Reaction: After this character wins a conflict - resolve the contested ring's effect.
flavorText: "It is no wonder the kami shun this place." - Kitsu Takeko
name: Bloodthirsty Kansen

text: Reaction: After this character wins a conflict - each opponent discards the top 8 cards of their conflict deck.
flavorText: The villages thanked her with gifts of food and clothing, unaware that she was taking a much different rewards for healing their sick and wounded.
name: Bog Hag

text: Corrupted. No non-[clan-shadowlands] attachments. Interrupt: When the effects of an opponent's event would initiate, spend 1 fate - cancel those effects. (Limit twice per round.)
flavorText: Many samurai have fallen to the wiles of the demons of the Ivory Kingdoms.
name: Prakhara the Schemer

text: Corrupted. No non-[clan-shadowlands] attachments. This character cannot be evaded by the covert keyword. Reaction: After an opponent declares a [conflict-military] conflict against one of your provinces - ready this character.
name: Gashadokuro

text: Action: Choose a participating ready [clan-shadowlands] character - until the end of the conflict, that character gets +5[conflict-military] and cannot be bowed or moved home by opponents' card effects.
name: Power of Jigoku

text: Attach to a [clan-shadowlands] character. Reaction: After you play ths card - take another action after this one.
name: Blade of Chaos

text:
Attach to an opponent's character. Other [clan-shadowlands] cannot be played on attached character.
Attached character cannot participate in [conflict-political] conflicts.
name: Horrific Scarring

text: Action: If the current conflict is [conflict-political], switch the conflict type. Otherwise, choose up to 2 non-[clan-shadowlands] attachments on participating characters and discard them.
name: Violence and Evil

text: This event's effects cannot be canceled. Action: If you are attacking and count more current [conflict-military] skill in the conflict than your opponent - break each attacked non-stronghold province.
name: The Wall is Breached

text: Action: Choose a participating character - taint that character. If it is not a [clan-shadowlands] character, you may spend 1 fate to bow it.
flavorText: A day will come when the rightful Emperor sits the Emerald Throne.
name: Way of the Shadowlands

text: Attach to a [clan-shadowlands] character. Reaction: After you play this card, choose a participating character - taint it.
flavorText: "I have been enlightened by Fu Leng's blessing. Now, too, shall you be."
name: Tendrils of Corruption

text: Action: If the attacked province is tainted, resolve the contested ring's effect. Otherwise, taint each attacked province.
name: Drawn to Blood

text: Action: Choose a character in your dynasty discard pile with the highest printed cost among characters in your dynasty discard pile - put that character into play in the conflict, tainted.
name: Death After Life

text: This event's effects cannot be canceled. Action: Select one - either place 1 fate on each character you control, or put your warlord into play in the conflict with 3 fate on it.
flavorText: "Akuma no Oni will not stop until all of Rokugan burns." - Isawa Tadaka
name: At His Command

text: Action: Until the end of the conflict, each participating tainted [clan-shadowlands] characters gets +2[conflict-military] and +2[conflict-political] and each participating tainted non-[clan-shadowlands] characters gets -2[conflict-military] and -2[conflict-political].
flavorText: They say that which is better left unknown.
name: Evil Portents

text: Action: Choose a character you control in your home - move it to the conflict. If it is bowed, you may spend 1 fate to ready it.
flavorText: "Those growths were wings?" - Hiruma Izumi, final words
name: Uncontained

text: Attach to a [clan-shadowlands] character. Reaction: After you play this card - place 1 fate on attached character.
flavorText: "Then we shall fight again." - Hida Kisada
name: Unending Hatred

text: Action: Put your warlord into play in the conflict. You may move up to 2 fate from your fate pool to it.
flavorText: "Your screams taste of the delicate grey that soothes the soul." - Atsuko the Calamitous
name: Direct Assault

text: Attach to a [clan-shadowlands] character. While you are playing challenge mode, this card gains ancestral. While attached character is unique, it gains: "Reaction: After this character wins a conflict - each opponent must sacrifice a participating character."
name: Dark Brother's Blade

text: Action: For each ready participating character an opponent controls, that character's controller selects one - they must either bow that character or lose 1 honor. Then, taint each ready participating character each opponent controls.
name: Dark Bargain

text: Attach to an opponent's character. Other [clan-shadowlands] cannot be played on attached character. Interrupt: When attached character leaves play, its controller chooses one of their unbroken provinces - taint that province.
name: Lurking Treachery

text: Attach to a [clan-shadowlands] character. Reaction: After you play this card - play an attachment from your discard pile.
name: Permeating Mutation

text: Action: Choose a tainted character you do not control. That character's controller selects one - either they sacrifice that character, or you put your warlord into play in the conflict with 1 fate on it.
name: Consumed By Evil

text: This event's effects cannot be canceled. Action: Bow each tainted character you do not control and ready each tainted character you control. Each tainted character you control does not bow as a result of this conflict's resolution.
name: Blasphemous Act

text: Attach to an opponent's character. Other [clan-shadowlands] cannot be played on attached character. Treat attached character's printed text box as if it were blank (except for Traits).
flavorText: Even destiny had abandoned her.
name: Spiritual Isolation

text: Action: Choose a participating non-[clan-shadowlands] character - dishonor that character. You may spend 1 fate to resolve this ability twice.
flavorText: His mind raced as the makeup diminished in his cup. He would have to find more, at any cost, lest he be betrayed by the evil beneath his skin.
name: Shameful Affliction

text: Action: Increase the cost of each event an opponent plays in this conflict by 1. While playing challenge mode, this card gains: "Interrupt: When the effects of an event would initiate - cancel those effects."
name: Despair

text:
Attach to an opponent's character.
Attached character cannot have other attachments.
flavorText: "You don't understand! It's choking me!"
name: Madness

text: This event's effects cannot be canceled. Action: Each opponent must select one - either taint each of your unbroken provinces or reveal your hand and discard each card with printed cost 0 from it.
name: Duty's Cost

text: Attach to a [clan-shadowlands] character. Reaction: After you play this card, choose a non-[clan-shadowlands] attachments on a participating character or on the attacked province - discard that attachment.
name: Obsidian Shard

text: Action: Choose a participating non-[clan-shadowlands] character with printed cost 2 or lower - if that character is tainted, gain control of it and it gains a [clan-shadowlands] clan symbol. Otherwise, bow and dishonor it.
flavorText: The whispers had been right all along. His lord's treachery had to end tonight.
name: Exploit Weakness

text: Attach to an unbroken province. Attached province gets +1 strength (+4 strength instead if it is tainted). Forced Reaction: After a conflict is declared against attached province - each opponent loses 1 honor.
name: Tainted Wasteland

text: Action: Bow a participating non-unique (friendly) [clan-shadowlands] character - put your warlord into play in the conflict. Then, move all fate and attachments from the bowed character to your warlord.
name: In Service to Shadow

text: This event's effects cannot be canceled. Action: Resolve the conflict as if both teams had passed consecutively.
flavorText: "We fight Togashi's war, that the feuding of brothers will come to an end." - Togashi Kazue
name: The First War

text: Action: Bow this stronghold. Choose an element symbol on a card in play - replace that symbol with the symbol of a different element until the end of the phase.
name: Twin Soul Temple

text: Action: Bow this stronghold. Choose a dishonored character - abilities on that character cannot be triggered this phase.
name: Shiro Yogo

text: Corrupted. (This character enters play tainted.) Support. (Another player may help pay this card's fate cost.) Action: Sacrifice this character. Choose a status token on a character or province - discard that status token.
name: Exiled Guardian

text: No opponents' attachments. Reaction: After this character wins a [conflict-military] conflict, choose an opponent's participating character - dishonor that character.
flavorText: "Will reputation deflect a tetsubo's strike? I thought not."
name: Hida Backbreaker

text: Limit 1 per deck. Reaction: After an opponent declares a conflict against a province you control that does not contain a Kaiu Wall holding - take 1 honor from that opponent. (Unlimited.)
name: Third Tower

text: Support. (Another player may help pay this card's fate cost.) Reaction: After this character wins a conflict, choose a character - honor that character.
flavorText: "I will never stop protecting you."
name: Iron Warrior Vanguard

text: Action: During a conflict in which this character is participating, choose an honored character - move that character home.
flavorText: In honor of longstanding tradition, the Daidoji were welcomed among the Crab in defense of Rokugan. Their leadership, while effective, was somewhat less welcome.
name: Daidoji Strategist

text: Courtesy. Reaction: After you look at 1 or more cards in an opponent's hand (or those are revealed), choose a character - honor it.
name: Discerning Yoriki

text: Support. Reaction: After you play a Kihō event during a conflict in which this character is participating, choose a participating character with 1 or more status tokens on it and choose an unclaimed ring - move 1 fate from the chosen character to the chosen ring.
name: Togashi Dreamer

text: Action: During a conflict in which this character is participating, if you have played 3 or more cards during this conflict - draw 1 card.
flavorText: "You cannot hir me because you think you can hit me. I move with the flow of the kata, not with my mind, and am freed from the prison of thought."
name: Teacher of Empty Thought

text: When fate would be removed from characters during the fate phase, instead distribute that fate among unclaimed rings as evenly as possible.
flavorText: "The gong of the temple bell echoes the destiny that awaits us all."
name: Revered Bonshō

text: Support. (Another player may help pay this card's fate cost.) Reaction: After you play a Tactic card, choose a card in any player's conflict discard pile - place it into that player's conflict deck third from the top.
flavorText: "We will make it work."
name: Field Tactician

text: Action: During a conflict in which this character is participating, remove 1 or more Tactic cards in your conflict discard pile from the game. Choose a participating character with glory equal to or lower than the number of removed cards - bow that character.
name: Akodo Mastermind

text: Support. (Another player may help pay this card's fate cost.) Action: During a [element-void] conflict, choose a participating character. That character's controller selects one - either discard a status token from it, move it home or discard an attachment on it.
name: Void Wielder

text: During [element-air] conflicts you may play characters in your provinces as if they were in your hand. Characters played this way must be played into the conflict.
flavorText: "Though my heart be heavy, Kaze-no-Kami shall lift my spirit."
name: Isawa Skycaller

text: Support. (Another player may help pay this card's fate cost.) Action: During a conflict, choose 2 different status tokens on 2 different characters - treat one of the chosen status tokens as if it were the other until the end of the conflict.
name: Disciple of Deception

text: You are considered to be less honorable than each opponent.
flavorText: "Take comfort in the knowledge that my love was true."
name: Loyal Oathbreaker

text: Reaction: After you play an event during a conflict in which this character is participating, choose a participating character with printed cost 3 or lower. Its controller selects one - either bow that character or move it home.
flavorText: They betray not even a whisper
name: Silent Enforcer

text: Support. (Another player may help pay this card's fate cost.) Action: Each player in turn order may choose a character they control - ready the first chosen character, honor the second chosen character, and taint each other chosen character.
name: Reckless Avenger

text: While this character is attacking, the attacked province's strength cannot be increased. (This includes by holdings, strongholds, attachments, lasting effects and status tokens.)
flavorText: "I could barely shoot a bow at her age, and she's alread off winning a war!" - Grandmother Sakae
name: Seasoned Patroller

text: Reaction: After this character is declared as an attacker, choose a character with printed cost 2 or lower in your provinces (printed cost 4 or lower instead if you are first player) - put that character into play in the conflict.
flavorText: "I'd keep my distance, I've seen them bring down bears."
name: Moto Beastmaster

text: Support. (Another player may help pay this card's fate cost.) Action: During a conflict, in which this character is participating, choose a participating character with 1 or more status tokens on it - that character gets -2[conflict-military] until the end of the conflict.
name: Fearless Sailor

text: Corrupted. (This character enters play tainted.) Action: During a conflict in which this character is participating, lose 1 honor. Choose a [clan-shadowlands] character you own from outside the game with printed cost 2 or lower - put that character into play in the conflict. When it would leave play, remove it from the game instead.
name: Oni Tyrant

text: Reaction: After you play a character with printed cost 4 or higher - place 1 fate on it.
flavorText: When the clan champion visits, even lords are little more than servants.
name: Audience Chamber

text: Attach to a character you control. Interrupt: When a ring effect would initiate, if it chooses attached character as a target, sacrifice this attachment - cancel that ring effect.
flavorText: The difference between sanctity and suffering.
name: Jade Talisman

text: Restricted. Support. Attached character gains: "Reaction: After this character wins a conflict, choose a participating character with 1 or more status tokens on it - remove 1 fate from that character."
name: Jade-Inlaid Katana

text: Play only if you control a Shugenja character. Action: During a conflict, choose a participating character with 1 or more status tokens on it - set its base [conflict-military] and [conflict-political] skills to 0 until the end of the conflict. If that character is tainted, also remove 1 fate from it.
name: Jade Strike

text: Action: During a conflict, choose a participating Courtier character you control - for this conflict, each other participating character gets -X[conflict-political], where X is the chosen Courtier's glory.
flavorText: Even without her title, Kakita Ryoku's judgments prevail.
name: Preeminent Decree

text: Action: Dishonor a (friendly) character. Choose a character - honor it.
name: Resourcefulness

text: Support. (Another player may help pay this card's fate cost.) Action: During a conflict, sacrifice a (friendly) character with 1 or more status tokens on it - each defending character does not bow as a result of this conflict's resolution.
name: Masashigi's Sacrifice

text: Action: During a conflict, choose a participating Monk character – You may trigger each ability printed on that character an additional time this round (or specified period). If you have played another Kihō in this conflict, take another action after this one.
name: Centered Breath

text: Support. (Another player may help pay this card's fate cost.) Action: During a conflict, choose a participating Monk character – that character does not bow as the result of this conflict's resolution. If you have played another Kihō in this conflict, also honor that character.
name: Swell of Seafoam

text: Play only if you are more honorable than an opponent. Action: Choose a status token on a character - discard it.
flavorText: "I always doubted the gossip."
name: Prove Your Skill

text: Support. Action: During a conflict, choose a character. That character's controller selects one - - move that character home. -that character gets +3[conflict-military] until the end of the conflict. -that character can't be bowed by opponents' card effects during this conflict.
name: Directing the Battle

text: Action: Until the end of the phase, each character you control gets +1[conflict-military] and gains the Bushi trait.
flavorText: "Any of these farmers could be the difference between victory and defeat. Why would we not prepare them as best as possible?"
name: Peerless Discipline

text: While attached character is participating in a conflict whose element matches one of attached character's Traits, it gets +3[conflict-political] Action: Choose a non-character card in your conflict discard pile that shares a Trait with attached character - add it to your hand and sacrifice this attachment.
name: Spell Scroll

text: Action: During a conflict, choose a ring - move all fate from the chosen ring to the contested ring and switch them. (The chosen ring is now contested.)
flavorText: "If all elements are of the Void, then what is their opposite?" - Tao of Shinsei
name: Elemental Inversion

text: Support. (Another player may help pay this card's fate cost.) Action: Choose any number of non-[clan-shadowlands] players - each of those players fills each of their unbroken non-stronghold provinces with 2 facedown dynasty cards. (Max 1 per round.)
name: Dance of Chikushō-dō

text: Action: Choose a player - that player searches the top X cards of their deck for a card and adds it to their hand, where X is the number of Shugenja characters you control. Shuffle.
flavorText: "Does my Lord Bayushi fear the sunlight?"
name: Soshi's Memory

text: Play only if you control a Shugenja character. Support. Action: During a conflict, choose a participating character an opponent controls and a different non-unique character - the participating character becomes a copy of the non-unique character until the end of the conflict.
name: Betrayed Vision

text: Restricted. While you are the first player, attached character gains: "Reaction: After this character wins a conflict - your opponent loses 1 fate."
flavorText: Vibrant tassles often adorn Unicorn blades, their Ujik meaning largely forgotten.
name: Scarlet Sabre

text: Restricted. Support. While you are the first player, attached character gets +2[conflict-military]. Attached character gains: "Reaction: After a character either commits to or moves to a [conflict-military] conflict this character is participating in, choose a participating character with lower [conflict-military] skill than this character - bow it."
name: Daikyū

text: Action: During a conflict, if you have fewer cards in hand than your opponent, choose a character - until the end of the conflict, that character gets +X[conflict-military] and +X[conflict-political], where X is you opponent's honor bid.
flavorText: Fall down seven times, stand up eight.
name: Defiance

text: Action: During a [conflict-political] conflict, choose a participating character with [conflict-political] skill equal to or lower than its controller's honor bid - bow that character.
flavorText: "You seemed awfully excited to learn of Ikoma-sama's return. I thought you had barely spoken to her?"
name: Exposed Secrets

text: Action: During a conflict, choose a participating character - taint it.
flavorText: "Heavens, Asako-sama, are you unwell? You will shatter the ceramics!"
name: Lurking Affliction

text: Action: During a conflict, choose a participating Bushi character - until the end of the conflict, opponents' card effects cannot bow, move or dishonor that character. If it is bowed, ready it.
name: Way of the Warrior

text: This card's fate cost can only be paid for with fate on character you control. Action: During a conflict, lose X honor. Choose a non-unique [clan-shadowlands] character you own from outside the game with printed cost X - put that character into play in the conflict. When it would leave play, remove it from the game instead.
name: Accursed Summoning

text: Action: Taint a (friendly) unbroken province - each opponent discards cards from their hand, until they have an equal or fewer number of cards in their hand as you.
flavorText: The shrine was a lie, a facade for a maho-tsukai's personal laboratory.
name: Unveiled Corruption
